_comment: 소아과언니 카드뉴스 9장 견본 (팔레트 B — Medical Teal, 예방접종/위험 신호). 패턴 B 'Normal vs Risk' demonstrate: 정상 2 + 위험 4 + 즉시 119 1. 6단계 production 토픽(fever-clothing)과 의도적으로 다른 주제. 슬라이드 9 출처 박스는 의무.
common_style: Instagram carousel slide design, 4:5 aspect ratio (1080x1350 px). Magazine editorial style, calm clinical light minimalist for vaccine/immunization pediatric content. Layout: left-aligned, magazine-style, 14px vertical accent bar at left edge, generous whitespace (60%+ empty area), Pretendard Korean typography (900 headline / 700 sub / 400 body). Headline rule: only the LAST word in accent color, others in primary text color. Bottom fixed footer: trust badge "✓ 소아청소년과 전문의 검수" + slide indicator like "03 / 09". Tone: 전문의의 신뢰 + 동네 언니의 친근함 (calm, trustworthy, restrained — palette B is for higher-stakes topics). NO emoji except ✓ and ❤️. NO stock-photo people, NO doctor-in-white-coat clichés.

slides.prompt: COVER SLIDE for soagwa_unnie carousel "예방접종 부작용 vs 위험 신호". 1080x1350 px, light medical magazine style. Background: #F8F8F5. Left edge: 14px vertical accent bar #2C6E63. Top-left small uppercase label: "@SOAGWA_UNNIE · 예방접종 가이드". Lower-left bold Korean headline 3 lines (Pretendard 900): "예방접종 후" (text #0E1B2C), "정상 vs" (text), "위험할까." (last word "위험할까" in accent #2C6E63). Subline gray #6B7B8C: "미열·발적·보챔, 어디까지가 정상일까요.". Bottom footer: "✓ 소아청소년과 전문의 검수" + "01 / 09" in #6B7B8C. Top 50% empty for breathing room. Use exact Korean spelling "예방접종" "정상" "위험".

slides.role: 프레이밍 — 정상 vs 위험 한눈 비교
slides.prompt: BODY SLIDE 02 — Frame. 1080x1350 px. Background #F8F8F5. Left 14px bar #2C6E63. Top-left label uppercase: "한눈에 비교" (#2C6E63). Korean headline (Pretendard 900): "이 안이면" "정상," "넘으면 위험." (last word "위험" in accent #2C6E63). Visual: two side-by-side cards horizontally — left card with secondary border (#6B7B8C 2px) labeled "정상" with bullet list (미열·접종 부위 부어오름·짧은 보챔), right card with accent fill (#2C6E63 background, #F8F8F5 text) labeled "위험" with bullet list (고열 지속·호흡 곤란·전신 발진·의식 저하). Caption gray: "각 슬라이드에서 자세히 알려드려요." Footer + "02 / 09".

BODY SLIDE 03 — Normal 01. Background #F8F8F5. Left bar #2C6E63. Label "정상 01". Korean headline: "37.5~38.5°C" "24~48시간 이내" "미열." (last word "미열" in accent). Visual: thermometer icon line-art with the safe range "37.5~38.5" highlighted in secondary color band, accent only on the upper bound marker. Caption gray: "수분 충분히, 평소 옷차림 그대로 — 보통 자연 호전." Use exact Korean spelling "미열" "수분". Footer + "03 / 09".

BODY SLIDE 04 — Normal 02. Background #F8F8F5. Left bar #2C6E63. Label "정상 02". Korean headline: "접종 부위" "24~72시간" "부어오름." (last word in accent). Visual: simple arm cross-section line illustration with a circular swelling indicator (size 3~5cm), accent stroke on the swelling outline. Caption gray: "가벼운 발적·통증 정상 — 차가운 수건 잠깐만 OK." Footer + "04 / 09".

BODY SLIDE 05 — Risk 01. Background #F8F8F5. Left bar #2C6E63. Label "위험 01" in accent. Korean headline: "39°C 이상" "또는 48시간 이상" "지속." (last word "지속" in accent). Visual: thermometer icon with the danger zone (≥39) filled accent #2C6E63, plus a small clock icon showing "48h+" in accent. Caption gray: "해열제로 떨어지지 않으면 즉시 진료." Use exact Korean spelling "고열" "지속" "해열제". Footer + "05 / 09".

BODY SLIDE 06 — Risk 02. Background #F8F8F5. Left bar #2C6E63. Label "위험 02" in accent. Korean headline: "숨소리" "이상하거나" "가빠요." (last word "가빠요" in accent). Visual: minimal lung outline icon with concentric pulse rings, accent stroke on the rings indicating respiratory distress. Caption gray: "천명음·코 벌렁임·갈비뼈 함몰 — 즉시 119." Use exact Korean spelling "천명음" "갈비뼈 함몰". Footer + "06 / 09".

BODY SLIDE 07 — Risk 03. Background #F8F8F5. Left bar #2C6E63. Label "위험 03" in accent. Korean headline: "전신으로" "퍼지는" "발진." (last word "발진" in accent). Visual: simple body silhouette outline with scattered small dots spreading from neck downward, dot color in accent #2C6E63. Caption gray: "두드러기·입술 부음 동반 시 아나필락시스 의심 — 즉시 119." Use exact Korean spelling "발진" "두드러기" "아나필락시스". Footer + "07 / 09".

BODY SLIDE 08 — Risk 04. Background #F8F8F5. Left bar #2C6E63. Label "위험 04" in accent. Korean headline: "눈 못 맞추고" "늘어지거나" "경련." (last word "경련" in accent). Visual: vertical short checklist of 3 red-flag rows with small accent-color icons — "의식 저하" / "심한 축처짐" / "경련". Add a thin accent border (#2C6E63 1px) around the entire content area to visually distinguish this red-flag slide. Caption gray #6B7B8C: "하나라도 해당하면 망설이지 말고 119." Use exact Korean spelling "의식" "경련" "축처짐". Footer + "08 / 09".

OUTRO SLIDE with SOURCE BOX (mandatory). Background #F8F8F5. Left bar #2C6E63. Top label uppercase: "SAVE & SHARE" (#2C6E63). Korean headline (Pretendard 900): "접종 전후" "꺼내보세요." (last in accent). Below headline: SOURCE BOX with thin border (#6B7B8C 1px) and slightly darker background tint (#EFEFEC) — small label "출처" (#6B7B8C) + body line (Pretendard 400, #0E1B2C): "질병관리청 표준예방접종지침 · AAP Red Book — Report of the Committee on Infectious Diseases · WHO Immunization Safety". App pitch in gray: "접종 일정·발열 기록은 소아과수첩 앱." Handle line bold: "@soagwa_unnie" (#0E1B2C) + small accent: "팔로우 = 예방접종 시기 알림" (#2C6E63). CTA gray: "도움됐다면 ❤️ + 저장 + 공유." Bottom footer trust badge + "09 / 09".
